zh.lifeSummary: 當Constance OF ANTIOCH於大約1128年出生在安賀亞時，她的父親Bohemond II de Hauteville Prince of Antioch22歲，母親Alice of Jerusalem Princess of Antioch19歲。她於1153年與Renaud I de Châtillon Prince d’Antioche結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1187年7月4日在巴勒斯坦享年60歲。

zh-hans.Székesfehérvár, Fejér, Hungary: 匈牙利費也艾爾澤可斯費賀瓦
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Constance OF ANTIOCH于大约1128年出生在安賀亞时，她的父亲Bohemond II de Hauteville Prince of Antioch22岁，母亲Alice of Jerusalem Princess of Antioch19岁。她于1153年与Renaud I de Châtillon Prince d’Antioche结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1187年7月4日在巴勒斯坦享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: OF
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: possibly a metonymic occupational name for a fisherman, from orfe, a species of freshwater fish. Alternatively, a habitational name from Urff near Kassel, formerly Orpha.

nameMeanings.name: Constance
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval form of the Late Latin name Constantia, which is either a feminine derivative of Constans ( see Constant ) or an abstract noun meaning ‘constancy’. This was a popular name among the Normans, and was borne by, amongst others, the formidable Constance of Sicily ( 1158–98 ), wife of the Emperor Henry VI .

en.lifeSummary: When Constance OF ANTIOCH was born about 1128, in Antioch, her father, Bohemond II de Hauteville Prince of Antioch, was 22 and her mother, Alice of Jerusalem Princess of Antioch, was 19. She married Renaud I de Châtillon Prince d’Antioche in 1153. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died on 4 July 1187, in Palestine, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Constance OF ANTIOCH est née environ 1128, à Antioche, son père, Bohemond II de Hauteville Prince of Antioch, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Alice of Jerusalem Princess of Antioch, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Renaud I de Châtillon Prince d’Antioche en 1153. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 4 juillet 1187, à Palestine, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Constance OF ANTIOCH um 1128 in Antiochia geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Bohemond II de Hauteville Prince of Antioch 22 und ihre Mutter Alice of Jerusalem Princess of Antioch 19. Sie hat 1153 Renaud I de Châtillon Prince d’Antioche geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 4. Juli 1187 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Palästina.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Constance OF ANTIOCH è nata il circa 1128 nel Antiochia, sua padre, Bohemond II de Hauteville Prince of Antioch, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Alice of Jerusalem Princess of Antioch, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Renaud I de Châtillon Prince d’Antioche nel 1153. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 4 luglio 1187, nel Palestina, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Constance OF ANTIOCHが約1128年にアンティオキアで生まれた時，父Bohemond II de Hauteville Prince of Antiochは22歳，母Alice of Jerusalem Princess of Antiochは19歳であった。1153年にRenaud I de Châtillon Prince d’Antiocheと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1187年7月4日にパレスチナで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Constance OF ANTIOCH(이)가 대략 1128년 앤티오치아에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Bohemond II de Hauteville Prince of Antioch(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice of Jerusalem Princess of Antioch(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1153년 Renaud I de Châtillon Prince d’Antioche(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1187년 7월 4일 팔레스타인에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Constance OF ANTIOCH nasceu aproximadamente 1128, em Antioquia, seu pai, Bohemond II de Hauteville Prince of Antioch, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Alice of Jerusalem Princess of Antioch, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Renaud I de Châtillon Prince d’Antioche em 1153. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 4 de julho de 1187, em Palestina, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Constance OF ANTIOCH родилась около 1128 г. в местности Антиохия, её отцу по имени Bohemond II de Hauteville Prince of Antioch было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Alice of Jerusalem Princess of Antioch, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Renaud I de Châtillon Prince d’Antioche в 1153 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла 4 июля 1187 г. в местности Палестина в возрасте 60 лет.

sm.from 1130 to 1163: mai le 1130 e o'o I le 1163

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Constance OF ANTIOCH nació aproximadamente 1128, en Antioquía, su papá, Bohemond II de Hauteville Prince of Antioch, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Alice of Jerusalem Princess of Antioch, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Renaud I de Châtillon Prince d’Antioche en 1153. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 4 de julio de 1187, en Palestina, a la edad de 60 años.
